title: T-8001 MDC Single Cabinet Based Solution 3-10KVA
short_description: The i-Connect T-8001 Smart Cabinet system represents a cutting-edge solution tailored for small-scale data centers, catering predominantly to sectors like finance, government, education, healthcare, and small-scale enterprises. This intelligent single-cabinet setup encompasses a comprehensive array of functionalities, including intelligent power backup, distribution systems, environmental controls such as temperature, humidity, and smoke sensors, as well as meticulous monitoring and precision cooling mechanisms
product_info: Flexibility is a key feature, as this system is adept at serving both IT and non-IT environments, making it suitable for diverse settings ranging from remote locations to office spaces lacking dedicated IT infrastructure rooms. Engineered as a self-contained unit with airtight construction, it ensures the safety and cleanliness of equipment, thereby presenting an optimal solution adaptable to various environments. The plug-and-play design seamlessly integrates essential components such as a rack-mounted Uninterrupted Power Supply (UPS) with a capacity of up to 10kVA, coupled with a BAT pack, a Power Distribution Unit (PDU), and an internally mounted cooling system at its base.
technical_details: All in One Solution: Integerated rack system with power backup, lightning protecting, monitoring, cooling, and security features. Small Foot Print: Compact and Self-contained solution designed to minimize installtion space and coats. High Efficiency: An energy-efﬁcient system designed to maximize efﬁciency and save on energy consumption. Standarized Structure Design: A standardized structural design guarantees ﬂexibility for expansion and compatibility. Comprehensive Intellegent System: A standardized structural design guarantees ﬂexibility for expansion and compatibility
applications: Small & Medium data centers, Educations, Banks, Corporate Offices, Data storage, Manufacturing Industry, Healthcare

title: T-8002 MDC Dual Cabinet Based Solution 10-20KVA
short_description: The i-Connect T-8002 smart micro cabinet system is an intelligent dual cabinets based solution for small & medium level data centers, which is mainly used in ﬁnance, government, education, medical and micro enterprises.
product_info: T-8002 integrates many sub-systems such as modular power back-up UPS, power distribution, precision line-level refrigeration, sealed channel, moving ring monitoring, temperature, humidity, smoke sensor controls, cabinet and so on, and adopts modular, standardized and product-oriented design to realize rapid deployment, on-demand expansion, high efﬁciency, energy saving and intellegent management system
